类 DocUtil

java.lang.Object

Description: DocUtil

      返回:

    • findFilterMethods

      public static Set<String> findFilterMethods(String controllerName)
      Find methods if the user specified in "packageFilters". If not specified, return "*" by default, which means need all methods.
      参数:
      controllerName - controllerName
      返回:
      the methods user specified
      另请参阅:
      • cacheFilterMethods(String, Set)
      • isMatch(String, JavaClass)

      str - string to format
      values - to replace
      返回:
      formatted string

      public static String resolveAnnotationValue(ClassLoader classLoader, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.expression.AnnotationValue annotationValue)
      resolve the string of Add which has FieldRef(to be exact is FieldRef) children, the value of FieldRef will be resolved with the real value of it if it is the static final member of any other class

      classLoader - classLoader
      annotationValue - annotationValue
      返回:
      annotation value

    • replaceGenericParameter

      public static String replaceGenericParameter(String baseString, String originalGenericParameter, String replacementType)
      Replaces the specified generic parameter in a string with a given type, supporting multi-level generics.
      参数:
      baseString - The base string
      originalGenericParameter - The generic parameter to be replaced, like "T"
      replacementType - The type to replace the original parameter with, like "User"
      返回:
      The modified string

    • getJsonFormatString

      public static String getJsonFormatString(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaField javaField, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation jsonFormatAnnotation)
      Generates a JSON formatted string based on the provided Java field and JSON format annotation.
      参数:
      javaField - The Java field to generate JSON format string for.
      jsonFormatAnnotation - The JSON format annotation containing pattern and shape properties.
      返回:
      JSON formatted string based on the annotation properties or null if annotation is null.

    • isTimeType

      public static boolean isTimeType(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass)
      Determines whether the specified Java class is a time type.
      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class to check.
      返回:
      True if the class is a time type, otherwise false.

    • isTimeType

      public static boolean isTimeType(String fullyQualifiedName)
      Determines whether the specified Java class is a time type.
      参数:
      fullyQualifiedName - The Java class fullyQualifiedName to check.
      返回:
      True if the class is a time type, otherwise false.

    • isNumericType

      public static boolean isNumericType(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass)
      Determines whether the specified Java class is a numeric type.
      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class to check.
      返回:
      True if the class is a numeric type, otherwise false.

    • isNumericType

      public static boolean isNumericType(String fullyQualifiedName)
      Determines whether the specified Java class is a numeric type.
      参数:
      fullyQualifiedName - The Java class fullyQualifiedName to check.
      返回:
      True if the class is a numeric type, otherwise false.

    • processFieldTypeNameByJsonFormat

      public static String processFieldTypeNameByJsonFormat(boolean isShowJavaType, String fullyQualifiedName, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation jsonFormatAnnotation)
      Processes the field type name based on JSON format.

      This method is used to determine the corresponding JSON type representation based on the Java type and its annotations. It primarily handles the conversion of Java types to JSON types based on the @JsonFormat annotation's properties.

      参数:
      isShowJavaType - Whether to show Java types, not directly related to the processing logic here but may be used in future extensions.
      fullyQualifiedName - The fully qualified name of the Java field type.
      jsonFormatAnnotation - The @JsonFormat annotation instance of the field, used to extract shape information.
      返回:
      The string representation of the JSON type, or null if the conversion cannot be determined.

    • getStringBuilderByLevel

      public static StringBuilder getStringBuilderByLevel(int level)
      Generate indent string based on level.
      参数:
      level - the nesting level
      返回:
      the indent string

    • getIndentByLevel

      public static String getIndentByLevel(int level)
      Generate indent string based on level.
      参数:
      level - the nesting level
      返回:
      the indent string

    • copyAndReplaceDocx

      public static void copyAndReplaceDocx(String content, String docxOutputPath, String templateDocx) throws Exception
      replace docx content
      参数:
      content - doc content
      docxOutputPath - docx output path
      templateDocx - docx template
      抛出:
      Exception - exception
      从以下版本开始:
      3.0.8
